name: n8n-nodes-davix-h2i
description: Official n8n community node for Davix H2I, connecting workflows to the Davix H2I Engian (PixLab) h2i, image, PDF, and tools backends.

scripts.copy:icons: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='nodes/DavixH2I/davixH2I.svg'; const dst='dist/nodes/DavixH2I/davixH2I.svg'; fs.mkdirSync(path.dirname(dst), {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(src,dst); const idxJs='dist/src/index.js'; const idxDts='dist/src/index.d.ts'; if (fs.existsSync(idxJs)) fs.copyFileSync(idxJs,'dist/index.js'); if (fs.existsSync(idxDts)) fs.copyFileSync(idxDts,'dist/index.d.ts'); console.log('Copied icon:', src, '->', dst);"
